page: Amazon Web Services r8id.2xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 8 virtual CPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The processor includes a large 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions for accelerated vector and matrix operations.

The instance is managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor and includes 474 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes. This local storage provides low-latency, high-throughput data access directly attached to the host. Network connectivity is configured with a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core capabilities, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2177.0 and high text processing throughput. Single-threaded compression and decompression tasks, such as gzip and bzip3, show strong performance, alongside efficient text generation for small language models. Other metrics, including multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations, perform in the average range. The combination of high-speed DDR5 memory, dedicated CPU allocation, and local NVMe SSD storage makes this instance highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, caching layers, and text processing applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8id.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 8 vCPUs, 4 physical cores, and a 3.9 GHz clock speed. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 7 GHz and includes 474 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark results highlight top-tier single-core performance and strong single-threaded data compression capabilities, while multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics remain in the average tier. With its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and fast local storage, this instance is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and text processing tasks.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8id.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 vCPUs, 64 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong single-core and text processing performance.
